sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55177" key="kataskopiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατασκοπ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n55177.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">for scouting</tr_>: -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κὰ, τά</foreign> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πλοῖα</foreign>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg050:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Mi.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
